title: Quarantining in Her Late Husband’s Apartment Is Making Her Horny
description:
“Before” by Xu Xi Things were still fine, despite the dreams, until she forgot her grandson’s name. It happened on their weekly Zoom, when he was being his usual adorably talkative self. She was half listening to his digressively long tale about a kindergarten classmate—so like his Grandpa Bing, whose oral discourses were legendary among […]

The post Quarantining in Her Late Husband’s Apartment Is Making
hook: A widow alone in her dead husband's apartment discovers her own desire awakening—grief and sex collide in this quietly devastating story.

title: Slow Burn: Dispatch from Cannes
description: The wearied refrain—Cannes 2026 was a ho-hum edition, no masterpieces to see here, take the earlier flight home—obscured the quiet revolution taking place in film after film. This was a year of stories that build: All of a Sudden, The Dreamed Adventure, and La Gradiva are accumulative works, beautifully wrought
hook: A festival critic refuses the tired consensus that Cannes was boring this year—what actually matters when everyone's chasing the same verdicts.

title: Olivia Rodrigo – You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl So In Love
description:
Olivia Rodrigo

You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl So In Love

Drawing from 80s new wave, alt-rock and The Cure, Olivia Rodrigo builds a soundtrack to her own lovesick world, exploring her sound beyond the pop-punk frame

You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl So In Love feels like a door into the fantastical, dreamlike and somet
hook: Olivia Rodrigo channels The Cure and 80s alt-rock to make sadness sound gorgeous—a pop star learning that pain doesn't need permission to be beautiful.
